source.description: Built-in image generation contact sheet reviewed before cropping; approved final panel is saved as the finished raster artwork.
source.notes: All step frames should be cropped from the same generated contact sheet so the palette shape, thumb hole, brush, paint dabs, color, and shadow stay consistent.

process_strategy: Use one six-panel contact sheet that builds the palette and brush from guide shapes to a shaped oval palette, diagonal brush, paint dabs, restrained color, and final keeper-line strength.

final_elements.name: oval palette body
final_elements.description: A rounded painter's palette tilted slightly on the page.

final_elements.name: thumb hole
final_elements.description: A small rounded thumb hole near the upper side of the palette.

final_elements.name: diagonal brush handle
final_elements.description: A slim brush lying diagonally across the palette.

final_elements.name: metal ferrule and bristles
final_elements.description: A short metal band and pointed bristle shape at the lower end of the brush.

final_elements.name: paint dabs
final_elements.description: Several uneven paint blobs arranged around the palette surface.

final_elements.name: restrained paint color
final_elements.description: Loose colored-pencil accents on the paint dabs and brush tip.

final_elements.name: soft cast shadow
final_elements.description: A pale graphite shadow grounding the palette and brush.

frames.visible_job: Sets a light tilted oval for the palette body plus a diagonal guide line for the brush.
Turns the guide oval into a handmade palette outline and cuts in the thumb hole.
Builds the diagonal brush with a narrow handle, metal ferrule, and pointed bristles.
Places uneven paint blobs around the palette while keeping them clear of the thumb hole and brush.
Adds restrained color to the paint dabs and brush tip, plus a light shadow under the palette.

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens existing palette, thumb hole, brush, paint dab, color, and shadow marks without adding new parts.
allowed_changes: paper texture from the saved contact sheet

rejection_checks: No palette contour, thumb hole, brush part, paint dab, shadow, or core color choice should first appear in the final image.
The palette and brush must keep the same tilted pose and proportions in every frame.
The final image must not add jars, hands, lettering, table props, extra brushes, or background scenery absent from the process frames.
Do not use separately prompted step images that drift from this contact sheet.
